rules.description: This project uses vcpkg in manifest mode. Please keep this in mind when giving vcpkg suggestions. Do not provide suggestions like vcpkg install librar
When providing OpenCV samples that use the file system to read files, please always use absolute file paths rather than file names, or relative file p

directives.description: Prefer setting cache variables and other types of things through CMakePresets.json if possible.
